description_for_human: Authenticate clients and get onboarding, facility, and outreach details.
description_for_model: Use this plugin for Rabo client-specific answers. Before answering client-specific questions, call authenticate_client with the client_id and OTP if the user is not already authenticated in the session. After authentication succeeds, call business tools without client_id because the MCP server uses the authenticated session client. Do not invent client data.

functions.name: authenticate_client
functions.description: Authenticates the client session using client ID and OTP.

otp.description: One-time passcode. Local demo OTP is 9632.

returns.description: A JSON object with authenticated, client_id when successful, and message.

functions.name: get_client_onboarding_status
functions.description: Returns onboarding status for the authenticated client.

returns.description: A JSON object with client_id, status, and message, or AUTH_REQUIRED if not authenticated.

functions.name: get_client_basic_info
functions.description: Returns either the name or family value for the authenticated client.

field.description: The basic info field to retrieve.

returns.description: A JSON object with client_id, field, and value, or AUTH_REQUIRED if not authenticated.

functions.name: get_client_facility_limit
functions.description: Returns the authenticated client's name and current facility limit in EUR.

returns.description: A JSON object with client_id, client_name, facility_limit_eur, currency, and formatted_limit.

functions.name: summarize_client_outreach
functions.description: Returns outreach highlights for the authenticated client, including reasons and total questions to answer.

returns.description: A JSON object with client_id, client_name, outreach_count, questions_to_answer_count, reasons, highlights, summary, and outreaches.

tools.name: authenticate_client
tools.description: Authenticate a client session using client ID and OTP before using client-specific tools.

otp.description: One-time passcode. Local demo OTP is 9632.

tools.name: get_client_onboarding_status
tools.description: Get the onboarding status for the authenticated client.

tools.name: get_client_basic_info
tools.description: Get the authenticated client's basic name or family value.

tools.name: get_client_facility_limit
tools.description: Get the current facility limit in EUR and client name for the authenticated client.

tools.name: summarize_client_outreach
tools.description: Summarize outreach highlights for the authenticated client, including outreach reasons and how many questions should be answered.

conversation_starters.title: Facility limit
conversation_starters.text: What is the current limit on my company's facility?
